name: cantor_no_surjection
code:
import Mathlib

theorem cantor_no_surjection (A : Type*) : ¬∃ f : A → Set A, Function.Surjective f :=
  by intro h; obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h; exact Function.cantor_surjective f hf

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b <;> decide

name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {α β γ : Type*} (f : β → γ) (g : α → β) (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (f ∘ g) :=
  Function.Injective.comp hf hg

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict (f : ℕ → ℕ) (g : ℕ → ℕ) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) : 
  StrictMono (f ∘ g) := 
by exact StrictMono.comp hf hg

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem my_pow_add (a b : ℕ) : 2 ^ (a + b) = 2 ^ a * 2 ^ b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le {α β : Type*} [DecidableEq α] [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) :
  (s.image f).card ≤ s.card :=
by apply Finset.card_image_le

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : Nat) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  have h := Nat.even_or_odd n
  cases h with
  | inl h_even => exact Or.inl h_even
  | inr h_odd => exact Or.inr h_odd

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl {α : Type*} (A : Set α) : A ∩ Aᶜ = ∅ := by
  ext x
  simp

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by

theorem comp_injective {α β γ : Type*} (f : β → γ) (g : α → β) (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib.Data.Nat.Basic

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : (¬ (P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬ P ∨ ¬ Q)) :=
  not_and_or

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  have h := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  obtain ⟨p, hp_ge, hp_prime⟩ := h
  refine' ⟨p, _, hp_prime⟩
  linarith

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2 ^ n > 0 := by
  exact pow_pos (by norm_num) n

  Set.empty_subset s
